SEARCH
Package com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.CPU

Class DuckSprite

java.lang.Object
com.blackaby.Backend.Emulation.CPU.DuckSprite
public class DuckSprite extends Object
Holds one sprite entry prepared for scanline rendering.

The class stores screen-space coordinates derived from OAM and provides small helpers for reading the attribute bits used by the PPU.

  • Constructor Details

    • DuckSprite

      public DuckSprite(int y, int x, int tileIndex, int attributes)
      Creates a sprite snapshot from raw OAM data.
      Parameters:
      y - sprite Y coordinate adjusted by the DMG OAM offset
      x - sprite X coordinate adjusted by the DMG OAM offset
      tileIndex - tile index used by the sprite
      attributes - raw OAM attribute byte

  • Method Details

    • IsPriorityInternal

      public boolean IsPriorityInternal()
      Returns whether the sprite should sit behind non-zero background pixels.
      Returns:
      `true` if background priority is enabled

    • IsYFlip

      public boolean IsYFlip()
      Returns whether the sprite is vertically flipped.
      Returns:
      `true` if Y flip is enabled

    • IsXFlip

      public boolean IsXFlip()
      Returns whether the sprite is horizontally flipped.
      Returns:
      `true` if X flip is enabled

    • UsesPalette1

      public boolean UsesPalette1()
      Returns whether the sprite uses OBP1 instead of OBP0.
      Returns:
      `true` if palette 1 is selected

    • CgbPaletteIndex

      public int CgbPaletteIndex()
      Returns the CGB object palette index.
      Returns:
      palette index from 0 to 7

    • VramBank

      public int VramBank()
      Returns the sprite tile VRAM bank in CGB mode.
      Returns:
      VRAM bank index

    • toString

      public String toString()

      toString in class Object
